purpose: Semantic icon index for HTML prototypes. This file does not package final icon assets; it records preferred source lookup and fallback behavior.
sourcePriority: Figma node in current screenshot or Page 1
existing local asset exported from Figma
simple low-fidelity placeholder with explicit note
fallbackRules: Do not invent decorative icons when the source icon is unavailable.
Do not use emoji as product icons.
Use one consistent placeholder style within a single prototype.
Mark missing production icons as icon pending replacement in the output notes when relevant.

icons.fallback: three-line menu glyph inside the same container size as source
two-line slider placeholder or text-only setting entry
plus sign in a thin circle
small square placeholders matching source spacing

icons.preferredSource: bottom navigation instance from current Figma page
bottom navigation instance from current Figma page
icons.fallback: active rounded square placeholder using accent color

icons.preferredSource: bottom navigation instance from current Figma page
bottom navigation instance from current Figma page

icons.fallback: text-only circular entry with icon pending replacement note

icons.preferredSource: HTML text tag, not image asset
